progression_skeleton: Observation of the situation; invitation or permission gate; core point
primary_effect: Delicate persuasion — makes the point feel invited rather than imposed
avoid_when: High urgency situations where the point must arrive immediately
misuse_risk: Invitation can feel manipulative if the 'invitation' is rhetorical

progression_skeleton: Pattern or recurring scene; interpretation of what it means; recommendation
primary_effect: Change, motivation, sense-making — the audience recognises themselves in the pattern
avoid_when: When urgency requires the point first
misuse_risk: Can sound smug or presumptuous if the audience doesn't recognise the pattern

progression_skeleton: Concrete image or object; what it shows or means; the message point
primary_effect: Memorability, explanation — makes abstract points tangible and sticky
avoid_when: When the image is forced or precious
misuse_risk: Can feel theatrical or contrived if the object is not genuinely apt

progression_skeleton: Vivid future scene; what it means for today; present ask or action
primary_effect: Motivation, change — makes the present choice feel consequential and purposeful
avoid_when: When the future scene would feel manipulative
misuse_risk: Can drift into generic inspiration if the future scene is not specific

progression_skeleton: Option A vs Option B presented fairly; the point that emerges from the contrast
primary_effect: Decisions, positioning, tradeoffs — clarity through comparison
avoid_when: When one option is clearly wrong — false balance is misleading
misuse_risk: False balance can mislead; contrast can feel combative

progression_skeleton: Useful reflective question; space for reflection; point or recommendation
primary_effect: Participatory, clarifying — the audience arrives at the point with the speaker
avoid_when: When the audience needs the answer not the journey
misuse_risk: Can become evasive or circular if the reflection never resolves

progression_skeleton: Acknowledge the situation or feeling; ask permission to raise something; the ask
primary_effect: Respectful, invited, emotionally safe — especially for sensitive topics
avoid_when: When too much ceremony would feel contrived or slow
misuse_risk: Excessive ceremony weakens impact and can feel performative

progression_skeleton: What we share or have built; the challenge or change; why now; next step
primary_effect: Creates meaning and coherence under change — bridges past and future
avoid_when: When the continuity is not genuine — forced bridges feel false
misuse_risk: Generic continuity claims without specificity feel hollow

progression_skeleton: I-statement of feeling; one specific concrete example; clear request
primary_effect: Turns accusation or vagueness into something hearable and actionable
avoid_when: When multiple examples would read as a case file
misuse_risk: Can become evidence-dump if the example section expands
